description: Botón de carga + menú de carga de personal (P20_imagen3)
pre_capture_js: (() => { const trigger = document.querySelector("otto-web-tool-bar-toggle-button[data-qa-id='uploadDrivers'] button[data-qa-id='toolBarButtonToggle'], otto-web-tool-bar-toggle-button[data-qa-id='uploadPilotes'] button[data-qa-id='toolBarButtonToggle'], otto-web-tool-bar-toggle-button button[data-qa-id='toolBarButtonToggle']"); const modal = document.querySelector('gs-modal:has(otto-web-upload-drivers-modal)'); if (modal) { modal.setAttribute('data-capture-anchor', 'upload-drivers-modal'); } if (!trigger) return; const menuId = trigger.getAttribute('aria-controls'); let menu = menuId ? document.getElementById(menuId) : null; if (!menu) { const closeBtn = document.querySelector("gs-modal:has(otto-web-upload-drivers-modal) [gsmodalclose], gs-modal:has(otto-web-upload-drivers-modal) button.gs-button--variant-outline"); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.click(); trigger.click(); menu = menuId ? document.getElementById(menuId) : document.querySelector("gs-menu[role='menu']"); } if (menu) { menu.setAttribute('data-capture-anchor', 'upload-drivers-menu'); } })();
